rag_rules: Fix AGREE assume statement type errors by resolving root identifier references or removing invalid clauses
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when diagnostics point to invalid scope references
generic_rules: Validate AGREE expressions resolve to correct types (bool, int, real) before use
Ensure AGREE contracts only reference visible identifiers from the current scope
Use only declared helpers or visible AADL features in AGREE contracts
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes, not component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assume/guarantee expressions must evaluate to boolean type
Constants and equations in AGREE use int, real, and bool as scalar types
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead resolve references or remove invalid clauses
Do not reference subcomponent paths or implementation-level features in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics for non-type errors
Component type vs implementation scope distinctions beyond binding rules
